en: These are the words of the covenant that the LORD commanded Moses to make with the people of Israel in the land of Moab, besides the covenant that he had made with them at Horeb.
zh: 這些是耶和華在摩押地，吩咐摩西與以色列人所立的約的話，是耶和華和他們在何烈山所立的約以外的。

en: And Moses summoned all Israel and said to them: "You have seen all that the LORD did before your eyes in the land of Egypt, to Pharaoh and to all his servants and to all his land,
zh: 摩西把以色列眾人召了來，對他們說：“耶和華在埃及地，在你們面前，向法老和他的眾臣僕，以及他的全國所行的一切，你們都看見了，

en: the great trials that your eyes saw, the signs, and those great wonders.
zh: 就是你親眼見過的大試驗和神蹟，以及那些大奇事；

en: But to this day the LORD has not given you a heart to understand or eyes to see or ears to hear.
zh: 但是直到今日，耶和華還沒有給你們一顆能明白的心，能看見的眼睛，能聽見的耳朵。

en: I have led you forty years in the wilderness. Your clothes have not worn out on you, and your sandals have not worn off your feet.
zh: 我在曠野四十年之久領導你們；你們身上的衣服沒有穿破，腳上的鞋也沒有穿壞。

en: You have not eaten bread, and you have not drunk wine or strong drink, that you may know that I am the LORD your God.
zh: 飯你們沒有吃，清酒或烈酒你們沒有喝，這是要使你們知道耶和華是你們的 神。

en: And when you came to this place, Sihon the king of Heshbon and Og the king of Bashan came out against us to battle, but we defeated them.
zh: 你們來到了這地方，希實本王西宏和巴珊王噩就出來，與我們交戰，我們擊敗了他們。

en: We took their land and gave it for an inheritance to the Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of the Manassites.
zh: 奪取了他們的地，分給流本人、迦得人和瑪拿西半個支派作產業。

en: Therefore keep the words of this covenant and do them, that you may prosper in all that you do.
zh: 所以你們要謹守這約的話，並且遵行，好使你們在所行的一切事上都亨通。

en: "You are standing today all of you before the LORD your God: the heads of your tribes, your elders, and your officers, all the men of Israel,
zh: “今日你們全都站在耶和華你們的 神面前；你們的首領、族長、長老、官長和以色列所有的男子，

en: your little ones, your wives, and the sojourner who is in your camp, from the one who chops your wood to the one who draws your water,
zh: 你們的小孩、妻子和在你營中的寄居者，以及為你們劈柴挑水的人，都站在耶和華你們的 神面前，

en: so that you may enter into the sworn covenant of the LORD your God, which the LORD your God is making with you today,
zh: 為要叫你遵守耶和華你的 神今日與你所立的約，和他向你所起的誓；

en: that he may establish you today as his people, and that he may be your God, as he promised you, and as he swore to your fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob.
zh: 這樣，他今日可以立你作他的子民，他可以作你的 神，正如他曾經對你說過的，又對你的列祖亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起過誓的。

en: It is not with you alone that I am making this sworn covenant,
zh: “我不但與你們立這約，起這誓；

en: but with whomever is standing here with us today before the LORD our God, and with whomever is not here with us today.
zh: 而且也與那些今日和我們在這裡，一同站在耶和華我們的 神面前的人，以及那些今日不與我們同在這裡的人立這約，起這誓。

en: "You know how we lived in the land of Egypt, and how we came through the midst of the nations through which you passed.
zh: 你們清楚知道我們怎樣在埃及地住過，怎樣從列國中經過；

en: And you have seen their detestable things, their idols of wood and stone, of silver and gold, which were among them.
zh: 你們也見過他們的可憎之物，和他們那裡那些木、石、金、銀的偶像。

en: Beware lest there be among you a man or woman or clan or tribe whose heart is turning away today from the LORD our God to go and serve the gods of those nations. Beware lest there be among you a root bearing poisonous and bitter fruit,
zh: 恐怕你們中間有男人或女人，家族或支派，今日心裡偏離了耶和華我們的 神，去事奉那些國的神，又恐怕你們中間有惡根，生出毒草和苦堇來；

en: one who, when he hears the words of this sworn covenant, blesses himself in his heart, saying, 'I shall be safe, though I walk in the stubbornness of my heart.' This will lead to the sweeping away of moist and dry alike.
zh: 如果人聽了這咒詛的話，心裡仍然自誇說：‘我雖然照著頑梗的心而行，使好人和惡人一起滅亡，我還有平安。’

en: The LORD will not be willing to forgive him, but rather the anger of the LORD and his jealousy will smoke against that man, and the curses written in this book will settle upon him, and the LORD will blot out his name from under heaven.
zh: 耶和華必不肯饒恕他；耶和華的怒氣和憤恨必向這人發作，這書上所寫的一切咒詛都要降在那人身上，耶和華也必從天下塗抹他的名。

en: And the LORD will single him out from all the tribes of Israel for calamity, in accordance with all the curses of the covenant written in this Book of the Law.
zh: 耶和華必照著寫在這律法書上的約的一切咒詛，把他從以色列眾支派中分別出來，使他遭受災禍。

en: And the next generation, your children who rise up after you, and the foreigner who comes from a far land, will say, when they see the afflictions of that land and the sicknesses with which the LORD has made it sick-
zh: “後代的人，就是你們以後興起來的子孫，和從遠方來的外族人，看見了這地的災難和耶和華降與這地的疾病，

en: the whole land burned out with brimstone and salt, nothing sown and nothing growing, where no plant can sprout, an overthrow like that of Sodom and Gomorrah, Admah, and Zeboiim, which the LORD overthrew in his anger and wrath-
zh: 又看見了遍地有硫磺，有鹽鹵，有火燒，沒有播種，沒有出產，寸草不生，好像耶和華在烈怒和怒火中毀滅的所多瑪、蛾摩拉、押瑪、洗扁一樣，

en: all the nations will say, 'Why has the LORD done thus to this land? What caused the heat of this great anger?'
zh: 看見了這些的人和萬國的人都要問：‘耶和華為甚麼向這地這樣行呢？為甚麼大發烈怒呢？’

en: Then people will say, 'It is because they abandoned the covenant of the LORD, the God of their fathers, which he made with them when he brought them out of the land of Egypt,
zh: 人就必回答：‘是因為他們離棄了耶和華他們列祖的 神的約，就是耶和華把他們從埃及地領出來的時候，與他們所立的；

en: and went and served other gods and worshiped them, gods whom they had not known and whom he had not allotted to them.
zh: 去事奉別的神，向他們叩拜，就是他們不認識的神，也是耶和華沒有給他們指定要拜的神；

en: Therefore the anger of the LORD was kindled against this land, bringing upon it all the curses written in this book,
zh: 所以耶和華向這地大發烈怒，把這書上所寫的一切咒詛都降在這地上；

en: and the LORD uprooted them from their land in anger and fury and great wrath, and cast them into another land, as they are this day.'
zh: 於是耶和華在烈怒、忿怒和大怒中，把他們從他們的地土拔出來，丟在別的地方，像今天一樣。’

en: "The secret things belong to the LORD our God, but the things that are revealed belong to us and to our children forever, that we may do all the words of this law.
zh: “奧祕的事，是屬於耶和華我們的 神的，只有顯露的事，是永遠屬於我們和我們子孫的，好叫我們遵行這律法上的一切話。”
